en: The purpose of this form is to capture additional details and information about the incidents your company reported in your Avetta Annual Update task submissions. Please note this is NOT limited to incidents on Verizon sites only; please provide information as it relates to your company.
This section is capturing information for the CURRENT year as of January 1. This information has NOT been reported to Avetta yet, and is for Verizon review only.
Did your company have any incidents requiring in-patient hospitalization of one or more employees, amputation or loss of any eye within the past *three* (3) years?

NOTE: The information provided in this section should align with information reported to Avetta in the United State Annual Update tasks regarding OSHA citations. \n\nThis includes OSHA citations being contested with OSHA. Please provide any public documentation as appropriate if it is resolved or still open with OSHA.
Did your company have any De Minimis or Other Than Serious OSHA citations within the past three (3) calendar years?\n
NOTE: The information provided in this section should align with information reported to Avetta in the United State Annual Update tasks regarding OSHA recordable incidents. \n\n
